subject: Croagunk, a blue-grey frog-like Pokemon with inflated cheek sacs perched on a rocky surface in a natural outdoor setting
description: A compact, frog-like creature crouches on a rocky surface. It has a stocky bipedal build with inflated rounded cheek pouches on either side of its face, giving it a distinctively puffed appearance. Its coloration is blue-grey with darker accents. The background suggests a forested or natural outdoor environment with warm natural lighting. The creature faces roughly toward the viewer in a casual, grounded stance.
foreground: frog-like creature with inflated cheek sacs crouching on rock
background: natural outdoor environment with rock and foliage
